name: Greek Grilled Marinated Chicken Ocean Mermaid
recipeIngredient: 4 Garlic Cloves, mashed to a paste
2 2 1/2 To 3 Pound Chickens, cut into serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and pat dry chicken pieces.
2. In a large shallow dish, whisk together the oil, lemon juice, garlic paste, oregano, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Add chicken and turn to coat. Marinate for 2 days, covered and chilled. Turn chicken pieces twice each day.
4. Drain chicken pieces, reserving the marinade.
5. Grill skin side down over hot coals, basting with marinade for 30-35 minutes, turning once (chicken breast should be just springy to the touch).
6. Transfer chicken breasts to a platter to keep warm.
7. Continue grilling remaining chicken for about 10 more minutes or until thigh meat is tender.
